strengths: 15+ years of broad full-stack and distributed systems experience across web, mobile, and embedded
Exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience running an event-driven platform on Kubernetes, showing architectural ownership
concerns: No demonstrated executive (CTO/VP) leadership or experience scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+
Lacks production multi-agent AI systems experience in regulated, high-stakes environments
Limited fintech-infrastructure depth (credit systems, real-time risk, liquidity) relative to role requirements
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned senior/staff-level engineer with strong full-stack, distributed systems, and craftsmanship credentials, plus early exposure to agentic AI tooling through recent work at re:cinq. However, the role demands an executive technical leader with a proven record scaling teams to 30+, operating production multi-agent AI systems, and deep fintech-infrastructure expertise — areas where the resume shows limited evidence. Fit is stronger for a senior IC or tech-lead position than for a CTO seat at a venture-backed fintech scale-up.
